description_long: This is a compact, tracked military vehicle with a low, angular profile and a dark green exterior. The vehicle features a prominent open-topped turret equipped with a mounted machine gun and ammunition belt, as well as a long, slender barrel extending forward. The hull is covered with sloped armor plating, and the tracks are exposed, running along the length of the vehicle on both sides. Storage packs or tarps are visible on the front upper hull, suggesting field readiness. The vehicle's design is utilitarian, with minimal external markings and a matte finish to reduce glare. Its overall appearance is robust, functional, and optimized for tactical operations in urban or rugged environments.
description: A compact, tracked military vehicle with a mounted machine gun, sloped armor, and a matte green finish. It features exposed tracks, an open-topped turret, and field gear stowed on the hull.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, stowed gear on the upper hull, and the narrow profile of the tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the exposed track system, open-topped turret with mounted machine gun, and the long barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, engine deck, and the circular turret opening without the gun visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the track system, turret, and barrel, mirroring the left but with different stowed equipment visible.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible machine gun mount on the open-topped turret, with an ammunition belt; one long barrel (likely cannon) mounted at the front of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped steel armor plating, moderate thickness, especially pronounced on the front and turret. No reactive or modular panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green color, no visible camouflage pattern.
